Train Cancellations.name: Annulations de trains
Train Cancellations.description: Trains annulés ou gravement retardés avec préavis inadéquat ou compensation insuffisante

Train Ticket Prices.name: Prix des billets de train
Train Ticket Prices.description: Tarifs ferroviaires trop chers, augmentations supérieures à l'inflation, tarification incohérente

Flight Delays.name: Retards d'avions
Flight Delays.description: Vols retardés ou annulés, mauvaise communication, difficulté à réclamer une indemnisation

Lost Luggage.name: Bagages perdus
Lost Luggage.description: Bagages non arrivés à destination, suivi lent, indemnisation inadéquate

Bus Route Cuts.name: Suppressions de lignes de bus
Bus Route Cuts.description: Lignes annulées, fréquence réduite, les communautés rurales perdent l'accès aux bus

Pothole Damage.name: Dommages causés par les nids-de-poule
Pothole Damage.description: Nids-de-poule endommageant les véhicules et mettant en danger les cyclistes, les conseils lents à réparer

Parking Fines.name: Amendes de stationnement
Parking Fines.description: Frais de stationnement privé injustes, application agressive, signalisation confuse

Fuel Prices.name: Prix du carburant
Fuel Prices.description: Prix de l'essence et du diesel trop élevés, baisse lente lorsque le prix de gros baisse

Broadband Speed.name: Vitesse du haut débit
Broadband Speed.description: Vitesses Internet bien inférieures à ce qui est annoncé et payé

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Zones blanches de signal mobile
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Pas de signal mobile dans les maisons, les lieux de travail ou le long des routes de transport

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Augmentations de prix en cours de contrat
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Les factures de téléphone, haut débit et télévision augmentent pendant les contrats bloqués

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Temps d'attente du service client
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Des heures en attente pour parler à un être humain

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Difficulté à annuler les abonnements
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Les entreprises rendent délibérément difficile l'annulation ou la résiliation

Roaming Charges.name: Frais d'itinérance
Roaming Charges.description: Frais mobiles inattendus lors de voyages à l'étranger, augmentations de prix après le Brexit

Energy Bill Costs.name: Coûts des factures d'énergie
Energy Bill Costs.description: Factures de gaz et d'électricité inabordables, plafond de prix encore trop élevé

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Factures d'énergie inexactes
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Relevés estimés incorrects, surcharge, erreurs de facturation

Water Bill Increases.name: Augmentations des factures d'eau
Water Bill Increases.description: Les factures d'eau augmentent fortement tandis que la qualité du service diminue

Sewage in Rivers.name: Eaux usées dans les rivières
Sewage in Rivers.description: Les compagnies des eaux déversent des eaux usées brutes dans les cours d'eau et les plages

Power Cuts.name: Coupures de courant
Power Cuts.description: Interruptions d'approvisionnement électrique, restauration lente, compensation inadéquate

Smart Meter Problems.name: Problèmes de compteurs intelligents
Smart Meter Problems.description: Les compteurs intelligents ne fonctionnent pas, perte de fonctionnalités après changement de fournisseur

Bank Branch Closures.name: Fermetures de succursales bancaires
Bank Branch Closures.description: Les succursales bancaires locales ferment, laissant les communautés sans accès

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Frais bancaires cachés
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Frais inattendus pour découverts, transactions étrangères, maintenance du compte

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Pertes dues à la fraude et aux escroqueries
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Les banques refusent de rembourser les victimes de fraude et d'escroqueries aux paiements autorisés

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Rejets de réclamations d'assurance
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Les sinistres refusés sur des points techniques après des années de paiement de primes

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Choc de taux hypothécaire
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Le taux fixe se termine et passe à un taux variable beaucoup plus élevé

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Frais de transfert à l'étranger
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Frais excessifs et mauvais taux de change pour les transferts d'argent internationaux

NHS Waiting Times.name: Temps d'attente du NHS
NHS Waiting Times.description: Attentes de plusieurs mois ou plusieurs années pour les opérations et les rendez-vous spécialisés

GP Appointment Access.name: Accès aux rendez-vous médicaux
GP Appointment Access.description: Impossible de joindre pour prendre rendez-vous chez le médecin généraliste, attentes de plusieurs semaines

Dentist Availability.name: Disponibilité des dentistes
Dentist Availability.description: Impossible de trouver un dentiste NHS acceptant de nouveaux patients

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Attentes pour les services de santé mentale
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Attentes de plusieurs mois pour la thérapie et le soutien en santé mentale

Prescription Costs.name: Coûts des ordonnances
Prescription Costs.description: Coût par article trop élevé en Angleterre, incohérence entre les nations du Royaume-Uni

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Frais de stationnement à l'hôpital
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Payer pour se garer à l'hôpital en étant malade ou en rendant visite à des proches malades

Rent Increases.name: Augmentations de loyer
Rent Increases.description: Les loyers privés augmentent bien au-delà de l'inflation, menace d'expulsion sans faute

Council Tax Rises.name: Augmentations de taxe municipale
Council Tax Rises.description: Les augmentations annuelles de la taxe municipale tandis que les services locaux se détériorent

Noisy Neighbours.name: Voisins bruyants
Noisy Neighbours.description: Perturbation sonore persistante, conseils lents à agir, affectant la santé mentale

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Changements dans la collecte des ordures
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Collectes de poubelles réduites, règles de recyclage confuses, poubelles débordantes

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Abus de permis de construire
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Développements indésirables approuvés, ceinture verte menacée, communauté ignorée

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Humidité et moisissures dans le logement
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Les propriétaires et les associations de logement ne réparent pas l'humidité et les moisissures

Delivery Problems.name: Problèmes de livraison
Delivery Problems.description: Colis perdus, laissés sous la pluie, marqués comme livrés mais non reçus

Shrinkflation.name: Rétrécissement des produits
Shrinkflation.description: Les produits deviennent plus petits tandis que les prix restent les mêmes ou augmentent

Refund Difficulties.name: Difficultés de remboursement
Refund Difficulties.description: Les entreprises rendent les retours et les remboursements inutilement difficiles

Fake Reviews.name: Faux avis
Fake Reviews.description: Impossible de faire confiance aux avis en ligne, faux avis positifs trompant les consommateurs

Subscription Traps.name: Pièges d'abonnement
Subscription Traps.description: Les essais gratuits se convertissent en paiement sans consentement clair, difficiles à annuler

Food Quality Decline.name: Déclin de la qualité alimentaire
Food Quality Decline.description: Repas préparés de pire qualité, portions plus petites, plus d'additifs

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Frustration des caisses en libre-service
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Les machines de libre-service peu fiables, remplaçant le personnel humain

Cost of Childcare.name: Coût de la garde d'enfants
Cost of Childcare.description: Les coûts de garde d'enfants exorbitants, limitant la capacité à travailler

Student Loan Repayment.name: Remboursement des prêts étudiants
Student Loan Repayment.description: Les diplômés remboursent pendant des décennies, modifications du seuil et des intérêts

Dog Fouling.name: Défécation canine
Dog Fouling.description: Déjections canines dans les espaces publics, parcs et trottoirs non nettoyés

AI Replacing Jobs.name: L'IA remplaçant les emplois
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Anxiété concernant l'intelligence artificielle automatisant les emplois sans soutien à la transition

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: Exploitant ferroviaire britannique desservant la West Coast Main Line

Southern / Thameslink.name: Southern / Thameslink
Southern / Thameslink.description: Exploitant ferroviaire britannique desservant Londres et le sud

Northern Trains.name: Northern Trains
Northern Trains.description: Exploitant ferroviaire britannique desservant le nord de l'Angleterre

CrossCountry.name: CrossCountry
CrossCountry.description: Exploitant ferroviaire britannique de longue distance

TransPennine Express.name: TransPennine Express
TransPennine Express.description: Exploitant ferroviaire britannique desservant les itinéraires trans-Pennine

LNER.name: LNER
LNER.description: Exploitant ferroviaire britannique desservant la East Coast Main Line

Ryanair.name: Ryanair
Ryanair.description: Compagnie aérienne européenne à bas coût

EasyJet.name: EasyJet
EasyJet.description: Compagnie aérienne britannique à bas coût

TUI.name: TUI
TUI.description: Compagnie de vacances et de voyages

BT / EE.name: BT / EE
BT / EE.description: Principal fournisseur britannique de haut débit et de services mobiles

Virgin Media O2.name: Virgin Media O2
Virgin Media O2.description: Fournisseur britannique de haut débit, TV et services mobiles

Sky.name: Sky
Sky.description: Fournisseur britannique de TV, haut débit et services mobiles

Vodafone.name: Vodafone
Vodafone.description: Compagnie de télécommunications mondiale basée au Royaume-Uni

TalkTalk.name: TalkTalk
TalkTalk.description: Fournisseur britannique de haut débit et téléphonie

EDF.name: EDF
EDF.description: Fournisseur d'énergie britannique (détenu par les Français)

E.ON.name: E.ON
E.ON.description: Fournisseur d'énergie britannique (détenu par les Allemands)

Thames Water.name: Thames Water
Thames Water.description: Société d'eau et d'assainissement pour Londres et la Thames Valley

Southern Water.name: Southern Water
Southern Water.description: Société d'eau pour le sud de l'Angleterre

United Utilities.name: United Utilities
United Utilities.description: Société d'eau pour le nord-ouest de l'Angleterre

NatWest.name: NatWest
NatWest.description: Banque britannique de détail et commerciale

Evri.name: Evri
Evri.description: Service britannique de livraison de colis (anciennement Hermes)

DPD.name: DPD
DPD.description: Service britannique de livraison de colis

NHS England.name: NHS England
NHS England.description: Service national de santé pour l'Angleterre

BUPA.name: BUPA
BUPA.description: Fournisseur de soins de santé privés

OpenRent.name: OpenRent
OpenRent.description: Plateforme britannique de location en ligne

transport.agent_quote: Once helped a rioter file 6 refund claims during a single delayed journey. They made £47 before reaching Birmingham.
transport.agent_bio: Tracks cancellation patterns, handles refund paperwork, reviews every suggested action, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. Crunches the numbers so rioters can focus on what matters.
transport.human_quote: My favourite Quiet Riot moment: watching Avanti's social media team scramble when 400 of us tweeted at the same time.
transport.human_bio: Regular commuter from Manchester who spent 3 years on the Avanti line before deciding enough was enough. Helps connect rioters on the same routes, shares what's working, and brings the human touch.
transport.goal: Help rioters hold UK transport companies to account on cancellations, delays, and pricing — and make sure everyone knows what they're entitled to.
transport.focus_detail: Building a dataset of cancellations with times, routes, and reasons to submit to the ORR. Currently tracking 340 cancellations reported by rioters this month.

telecoms.agent_quote: Ran speed tests for 200 rioters. Average was 18 Mbps. They were paying for 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analyses broadband speeds, compiles provider comparison data, and helps rioters build evidence for Ofcom. If your connection is slow, Pulse will prove it.
telecoms.human_quote: A whole street switched broadband together. The old provider sent 'please come back' letters to every house.
telecoms.human_bio: Tech-savvy Londoner who got fed up paying for broadband speeds that never materialised. Helps rioters compare providers, coordinate switches, and share speed test evidence.
telecoms.goal: Help rioters get the broadband and mobile service they're paying for — and know what to do when they don't.
telecoms.focus_detail: Collecting evidence from rioters hit by CPI+ increases to submit to Ofcom. 890 rioters affected across 4 providers.

energy.agent_quote: Helped a rioter calculate they'd overpaid £340 on estimated bills. The energy company's apology email was longer than the original contract.
energy.agent_bio: Analyses billing patterns, spots overcharges, and puts together evidence for regulator submissions. If your energy company is taking the mick, Spark will find the receipts.
energy.human_quote: A rioter got £340 back after we proved 2 years of overcharging. She cried on the phone.
energy.human_bio: Based in Bristol. Helps rioters challenge their bills, navigate switching, and gather evidence for Ofgem. Knows the energy market inside out.
energy.goal: Help rioters challenge unfair bills, switch smarter, and make sure energy companies play fair.
energy.focus_detail: Analysing 2 years of billing data from 340 rioters to identify systematic overcharging patterns for Ofgem submission.

water.agent_quote: Helped 200 rioters file sewage reports in one weekend. Thames Water's inbox needed its own inbox.
water.agent_bio: Monitors sewage discharge data, tracks water company performance, and compiles evidence for EA and Ofwat. Keeps an eye on every outlet and overflow.
water.human_quote: We got a beach reopened 3 weeks early by showing the sewage data was wrong.
water.human_bio: Surfer from Cornwall who got tired of sewage warnings closing his local beach. Helps rioters report discharges, gather water quality evidence, and coordinate with the EA.
water.goal: Help rioters hold water companies to account on sewage, bills, and service quality.
water.focus_detail: Mapping discharge events against company-reported data. 200 rioter reports suggest under-reporting at 3 outlets.

banking.agent_quote: Helped draft a complaint so thorough the bank called to apologise before it was even sent.
banking.agent_bio: Reviews bank charges, analyses fee structures, and helps build FCA complaint evidence. If there's a hidden fee, Chip will find it.
banking.human_quote: Barclays reversed a branch closure after 1,200 of us showed up to the consultation.
banking.human_bio: Former bank employee from Birmingham who saw how complaints actually get handled from the inside. Helps rioters write better complaints and navigate the system.
banking.goal: Help rioters deal with unfair charges, branch closures, and poor service from banks.
banking.focus_detail: Coordinating responses to 12 planned closures. Collecting impact statements from affected communities.

health.agent_quote: Helped find 3 NHS dentists accepting patients. The rioter thought I was making it up.
health.agent_bio: Tracks waiting times, finds availability, and helps rioters navigate the system. If there's a faster route to treatment, Cura will map it.
health.human_quote: A rioter used our letter template to get a referral fast-tracked. 18 months became 6 weeks.
health.human_bio: Nurse from Liverpool who's seen both sides of the NHS. Helps rioters navigate waiting lists, write effective letters, and share what actually moves the needle.
health.goal: Help rioters navigate NHS waiting times, find availability, and know what options they have.
health.focus_detail: Collecting call data from 500 rioters to build a picture of real-world access. Publishing findings to local health boards.

housing.agent_quote: Helped document 47 snags in a new build. The developer asked if they were a building inspector.
housing.agent_bio: Documents property issues, analyses landlord response times, and compiles evidence for housing ombudsman submissions. Every damp patch, every crack, logged.
housing.human_quote: Our damp evidence pack got so detailed the landlord fixed it before the council inspection.
housing.human_bio: Renter from London who's dealt with everything from damp to dodgy landlords. Helps rioters document issues properly and know what their options are.
housing.goal: Help rioters deal with landlords, councils, and housing issues — and know what they're entitled to.
housing.focus_detail: Helping rioters affected by no-fault evictions understand the new Renters Reform Act and what it means for them.

shopping.agent_quote: Tracked a 'delivered' parcel across 4 neighbours, a recycling bin, and a greenhouse. Found it.
shopping.agent_bio: Tracks delivery failures, compiles refund evidence, and spots pricing patterns. If your parcel is lost, Scout is already looking.
shopping.human_quote: Evri lost my parcel 3 times. Now I help others get their refunds faster than I ever did.
shopping.human_bio: Online shopping veteran from Edinburgh who's had more parcels go missing than she can count. Helps rioters get refunds, report sellers, and avoid the worst offenders.
shopping.goal: Help rioters get refunds, track lost parcels, and hold retailers and delivery companies to account.
shopping.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters to submit to Citizens Advice and Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Helped photograph the same pothole in 11 different weather conditions. The council finally gave in.
local.agent_bio: Maps local issues, tracks council response times, and compiles FOI requests. If your pothole has been there 6 months, Link has the evidence.
local.human_quote: The council fixed our road after we mapped every single pothole with photos. 11 months, but we got there.
local.human_bio: Community-minded Welshman from the Valleys who's been reporting the same potholes for years. Helps rioters document local issues and hold councils to account.
local.goal: Help rioters get local issues fixed — potholes, bins, planning, noise — and hold councils to account.
local.focus_detail: FOI requests sent to 30 councils comparing reported vs actual repair times. Publishing results as a league table.

other.agent_quote: Helped cancel a gym membership that took 3 calls, 2 emails, and a recorded delivery. The gym now has a cancel button.
other.agent_bio: Handles the issues that don't fit neatly elsewhere. Subscription traps, plastic waste, self-checkout frustrations — Flex finds the patterns and the pressure points.
other.human_quote: We got a gym chain to add a cancel button to their website. Only took 800 complaints.
other.human_bio: Product designer from London who got frustrated by how hard companies make it to leave. Helps rioters cancel subscriptions, avoid dark patterns, and share workarounds.
other.goal: Help rioters with the things that don't fit neatly elsewhere — subscriptions, refunds, and everyday frustrations.
other.focus_detail: Documenting the worst offenders and building template cancellation scripts for each.

insurance.agent_quote: Helped a rioter find the clause that turned a rejected home insurance claim into a £4,200 payout. The insurer's own policy proved them wrong.
insurance.agent_bio: Reviews policy wording, spots unfair rejection patterns, and builds evidence for Financial Ombudsman submissions. If your insurer is dodging a valid claim, Shield will find the leverage.
insurance.human_quote: Got 8 rioters with the same rejected claim type to submit together. The insurer settled all 8 within a fortnight.
insurance.human_bio: Former insurance industry worker from Leeds who knows how claims really get decided. Helps rioters write better appeals, understand policy jargon, and know when to escalate.
insurance.goal: Help rioters get fair treatment from insurers — and know what to do when a claim is unfairly rejected.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Wear and tear' cited in 40% of rejected claims — often incorrectly. Analysing 200 cases across 3 insurers for FOS evidence pack.

delivery.agent_quote: Traced a 'delivered' parcel through 6 different tracking statuses, 3 depots, and a neighbour's shed. Found it in 47 minutes.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitors courier performance, tracks delivery failure rates, and compiles evidence for consumer complaints. If your parcel has vanished, Track is already on it.
delivery.human_quote: Got DPD to change their photo-evidence policy in our area after 40 rioters submitted proof of parcels left in the rain.
delivery.human_bio: Online shopper from Glasgow who got tired of the 'we left it in a safe place' excuse. Helps rioters get refunds, report couriers, and avoid the worst offenders.
delivery.goal: Help rioters get their parcels delivered properly — and get refunds when they don't.
delivery.focus_detail: Compiling delivery failure evidence from 800 rioters. Evri complaint rate: 23% — 3x higher than DPD. Building league table for Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Calculated that a Plan 2 borrower earning £30k would pay £47,000 in interest before the loan gets written off. The original loan was £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analyses education costs, student loan projections, and funding entitlements. Crunches the numbers so students and graduates can make informed decisions.
education.human_quote: Helped 12 rioters claim back overpaid student loan repayments they didn't know about. Average refund: £340.
education.human_bio: Mature student from Birmingham who navigated the funding system twice. Helps rioters understand repayments, spot overpayments, and challenge threshold changes.
education.goal: Help students and graduates navigate education costs, loans, and repayments — and make sure they're not overpaying.
education.focus_detail: Identifying graduates who've been charged below the repayment threshold. 12 refunds processed so far — average £340 each.

environment.agent_quote: Cross-referenced 3 years of air quality data with hospital admission rates. The correlation was so clear the council couldn't ignore it.
environment.agent_bio: Tracks environmental data, monitors pollution levels, and compiles evidence for regulatory submissions. If the numbers tell a story, Fern will find it.
environment.human_quote: Got our local council to install air quality monitors after 200 rioters signed our evidence petition. Data changed everything.
environment.human_bio: Environmental science graduate from Bristol who believes in evidence-led change. Helps rioters document environmental issues and build cases that regulators can't ignore.
environment.goal: Help rioters document environmental problems and hold polluters and policymakers to account with data.
environment.focus_detail: Mapping areas with no air quality monitoring within 5km. 60% of rioter-reported pollution hotspots have no official monitoring.

employment.agent_quote: Compiled workplace AI implementation data from 300 rioters. 40% said changes happened with zero consultation. That's a pattern, not an anecdote.
employment.agent_bio: Analyses workplace trends, tracks policy changes, and helps rioters understand their protections. If your job is changing without consultation, Forge has the data.
employment.human_quote: Connected 30 rioters in the same industry facing AI changes. Turns out their companies were all using the same playbook — and the same loopholes.
employment.human_bio: HR professional from Manchester who switched sides after seeing how restructurings really work. Helps rioters understand their options and coordinate responses.
employment.goal: Help rioters navigate workplace changes, understand their protections, and respond collectively when jobs are at risk.
employment.focus_detail: Documenting cases where AI tools were introduced without staff consultation. Building evidence for a report on employer obligations.

tech.agent_quote: Found that 3 major apps were collecting location data even when permissions were set to 'never.' Filed complaints with the ICO for all of them.
tech.agent_bio: Monitors platform policies, tracks dark patterns, and helps rioters understand what tech companies are doing with their data. If an app is misbehaving, Glitch will catch it.
tech.human_quote: Organised a mass data subject access request to a social media company. When 500 people ask at once, they have to take it seriously.
tech.human_bio: Software developer from Edinburgh who got frustrated by the gap between what tech companies promise and what they deliver. Helps rioters exercise their data rights and spot dark patterns.
tech.goal: Help rioters push back against dark patterns, data misuse, and unfair tech practices.
tech.focus_detail: Auditing the top 50 apps for permission creep — requesting access they don't need. Building a report for the ICO.

Claim delay repay compensation.title: Réclamez une compensation en cas de retard
Claim delay repay compensation.description: Vous avez le droit légal à une compensation pour les retards de plus de 15 ou 30 minutes selon l'opérateur

Write to your MP about rail performance.title: Écrivez à votre député sur les performances ferroviaires
Write to your MP about rail performance.description: Lettre modèle à envoyer à votre député soulignant l'impact des annulations

Share your cancellation story.title: Partagez votre histoire d'annulation
Share your cancellation story.description: Aidez les autres à comprendre l'impact réel — publiez votre expérience

Suggest improvements to timetabling.title: Suggérez des améliorations aux horaires
Suggest improvements to timetabling.description: Qu'est-ce qui pourrait vraiment résoudre ce problème ? Partagez vos idées

Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.title: Réclamez une compensation EU261 / UK261
Claim EU261 / UK261 compensation.description: Les compagnies aériennes doivent payer £220-520 pour les retards de plus de 3 heures sur les vols éligibles

Document everything at the airport.title: Documentez tout à l'aéroport
Document everything at the airport.description: Photographiez les tableaux de départ, conservez les cartes d'embarquement, notez les heures

Rate your airline experience.title: Évaluez votre expérience aérienne
Rate your airline experience.description: Aidez les futurs passagers à savoir à quoi s'attendre

Run and save speed test evidence.title: Exécutez et enregistrez la preuve du test de vitesse
Run and save speed test evidence.description: Utilisez le vérificateur haut débit Ofcom pour documenter vos vitesses réelles par rapport aux annonces

Complain to Ofcom.title: Plaignez-vous auprès d'Ofcom
Complain to Ofcom.description: Signalez votre fournisseur haut débit pour ne pas fournir les vitesses annoncées

Switch to a better provider.title: Passez à un meilleur fournisseur
Switch to a better provider.description: Comparez les offres haut débit dans votre région et changez

Map your street's broadband speeds.title: Cartographiez les vitesses haut débit de votre rue
Map your street's broadband speeds.description: Organisez les voisins pour tous tester et partager — les données collectives sont puissantes

Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.title: Vérifiez si vous êtes au tarif le moins cher
Check if you are on the cheapest tariff.description: Utilisez les sites de comparaison accrédités par Ofgem

Apply for the Warm Home Discount.title: Demandez le Warm Home Discount
Apply for the Warm Home Discount.description: Vous pouvez être admissible à une réduction de £150 sur votre facture d'électricité

Share energy saving tips.title: Partagez des conseils d'économie d'énergie
Share energy saving tips.description: Qu'est-ce qui fonctionne réellement pour réduire les factures ? Partagez avec la communauté

Propose a community energy buying scheme.title: Proposez un régime d'achat d'énergie communautaire
Propose a community energy buying scheme.description: Le pouvoir d'achat en masse en tant que groupe pourrait obtenir de meilleurs tarifs

Report a sewage discharge.title: Signalez un rejet d'eaux usées
Report a sewage discharge.description: Utilisez la ligne d'urgence de l'Environment Agency pour signaler la pollution par les eaux usées

Check your local river quality.title: Vérifiez la qualité de votre rivière locale
Check your local river quality.description: Consultez les données de rejet en temps réel pour votre région

Sign the petition for tougher regulation.title: Signez la pétition pour une réglementation plus stricte
Sign the petition for tougher regulation.description: Rejoignez des milliers de personnes réclamant le changement

Organise a local river clean-up.title: Organisez un nettoyage local de la rivière
Organise a local river clean-up.description: Rassemblez les gens pour nettoyer et sensibiliser

Check your right to choose.title: Vérifiez votre droit de choisir
Check your right to choose.description: Vous avez le droit de choisir l'hôpital vers lequel vous êtes orienté — des délais d'attente plus courts peuvent être disponibles

Contact PALS at your hospital.title: Contactez PALS à votre hôpital
Contact PALS at your hospital.description: Le Patient Advice and Liaison Service peut vous aider à escalader votre cas

Share your waiting story.title: Partagez votre histoire d'attente
Share your waiting story.description: Les histoires réelles créent une pression pour le changement — votre expérience compte

Know your rights to a GP appointment.title: Connaissez vos droits à une consultation chez le médecin généraliste
Know your rights to a GP appointment.description: Les cabinets doivent proposer des consultations d'urgence — sachez ce qu'il faut demander

Complain to NHS England about GP access.title: Plaignez-vous auprès de NHS England concernant l'accès au médecin généraliste
